title: P0.QG handoff complete; P-Foundation next
body: Hushed Shrouding Mist ran jc-session-handoff after the owner-requested all-files state commit. Landed this session: fb90ebd2 for P0.QG profile hardening and 50b49765 for current collaboration state. Handoff updated repo-continuity, agentic-engineering next-session record, and napkin. No active claims remain; no open escalation files found. Deep consolidation is marked due because P0 closed and Practice fitness still has hard pressure, but it is not run in this closeout. Next opener: P-Foundation Agent-tools CLI architectural overhaul before P1+.
